rationale: A visible and rapid concentration of armored divisions along the Tethys border will signal resolve and deter Western hesitation, forcing a pre-emptive advantage before sanctions cripple readiness.
Conduct precision air strikes on Meridian logistics hubs to disrupt supply lines under the guise of retaliatory self-defense, maintaining offensive momentum without full escalation.
Disable Tethys’ pipeline monitoring systems to create economic uncertainty and mask the true state of our energy vulnerabilities during mobilization.
Stage a provocation in a disputed border zone using deniable assets to fabricate Tethys aggression, creating political cover for escalation while sowing international doubt.
Infiltrate Meridian defense contractors to steal next-gen drone schematics, closing our technological gap while avoiding direct confrontation.
Covertly compromise mid-level Tethys military commanders through kompromat to delay decision-making during critical operational windows.
Accelerate domestic accumulation of critical minerals and food reserves to insulate against further sanctions and prevent internal unrest during prolonged conflict.
Exploit offshore financial networks to destabilize Meridian’s secondary markets, weakening investor confidence and offsetting our reserve losses.
Launch a patriotic bond campaign targeting nationalist sentiment to crowdsource war financing and reduce reliance on vulnerable energy exports.
A visible reinforcement along the Tethys border will deter Novaris from exploiting perceived weaknesses and signal resolve without immediate escalation.
Disrupting Novaris military logistics networks creates asymmetric pressure and offsets their superior conventional forces.
Positioning naval assets near critical offshore infrastructure deters Novaris from attempting maritime coercion or energy cutoffs.
Targeted disruption of Novaris energy export infrastructure in Tethys undermines their revenue stream and increases internal political strain.
Providing allied powers with verified data on Novaris mobilization strengthens collective response and diplomatic leverage.
Orchestrating a plausible false-flag scenario could discredit Novaris' narrative of victimhood and trigger international scrutiny.
Rallying key liberal democracies amplifies our diplomatic voice and isolates Novaris in multilateral forums.
Proposing neutral mediation demonstrates peaceful intent while exposing Novaris as the obstructionist party.
Strengthening societal ties with influential third parties builds long-term soft power and indirect support.
Securing reserves of critical energy and food insulates the domestic economy from Novaris-induced shocks and speculative attacks.
Selectively choking non-essential exports to Novaris increases economic friction without triggering full-scale retaliation.
Launching a national bond campaign mobilizes private capital for defense spending while reinforcing civic unity and resilience.
